scope.target: Isolate synthetic aggregate-runner fixtures from outer workflow closeout variables
constraints: Keep real COMMIT_RANGE/WORKFLOW_ID closeout validation enabled
Permit test-specific environment overrides after isolation

steps: Remove closeout-only variables from the synthetic fixture base environment
Run focused tests with outer closeout variables
execution.last_completed_step: Isolated the synthetic runner and passed the composed full closeout gate.
execution.next_action: Request final independent verification before closing VERIFY-001.

results.summary: Synthetic runner fixtures now discard outer COMMIT_RANGE and WORKFLOW_ID unless a test explicitly supplies them, while the real outer gate still validates the selected workflow range.
tests_run: Fail-closed runner suite passed 18/18 with closeout variables exported
Full composed gate passed 21/21 required checks with zero advisories
Selected workflow range passed 33 first-parent commits inside the full gate
results.residual_risk: Other future synthetic fixtures must continue to control optional outer environment inputs explicitly.
